017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet;
018
019import java.lang.reflect.*;
020import java.util.*;
021
022import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.*;
023
024import jakarta.servlet.*;
025import jakarta.servlet.annotation.*;
026
027/**
028 * Plain Servlet-spec {@link ServletContainerInitializer} that auto-mounts {@link RestServlet}
029 * subclasses at their self-declared top-level paths in non-Spring (e.g. {@code web.xml} / external
030 * WAR) deployments.
031 *
032 * <p>
033 * Discovered by the container via {@code META-INF/services/jakarta.servlet.ServletContainerInitializer}
034 * and (through {@link HandlesTypes @HandlesTypes(RestServlet.class)}) handed every concrete
035 * {@link RestServlet} on the webapp classpath. It mirrors the Jetty-microservice and Spring Boot
036 * auto-registration mechanisms: the mount paths are read from the top-level chain
037 * ({@link Rest#paths() @Rest(paths)} / {@code getPaths()}) via
038 * {@link RestContext#resolveTopLevelPaths(Class, Object, org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.BeanStore)
039 * RestContext.resolveTopLevelPaths(...)} &mdash; <b>not</b> {@code path()} (child-composition).
040 *
041 * <h5 class='section'>Activation:</h5>
042 *
043 * <p>
044 * Opt-in via the context init parameter {@code juneau.rest.auto-register=true} (parity with the
045 * Spring Boot {@code juneau.rest.auto-register} property). When unset or not {@code true}, the
046 * initializer does nothing, so it never collides with servlets the deployer declared manually in
047 * {@code web.xml}. Declare it in {@code web.xml}:
048 *
049 * <p class='bxml'>
050 *    <xt>&lt;context-param&gt;</xt>
051 *       <xt>&lt;param-name&gt;</xt>juneau.rest.auto-register<xt>&lt;/param-name&gt;</xt>
052 *       <xt>&lt;param-value&gt;</xt>true<xt>&lt;/param-value&gt;</xt>
053 *    <xt>&lt;/context-param&gt;</xt>
054 * </p>
055 *
056 * <h5 class='section'>Behavior:</h5>
057 *
058 * <p>
059 * For each handled class that is concrete, carries a {@link Rest @Rest} annotation, is no-arg
060 * instantiable, and resolves to at least one top-level path, an instance is created and added to the
061 * servlet context at each resolved path. Classes that resolve to no top-level paths (pure mixins /
062 * child-composed resources) or that cannot be instantiated with a no-arg constructor are skipped.
063 *
064 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
065 *    <li class='jm'>{@link RestContext#resolveTopLevelPaths(Class, Object, org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.BeanStore)}
066 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/RestServerCompositionMixinsAndPaths">REST Server &mdash; Mixins and Multi-Mount Paths</a>
067 * </ul>
068 *
069 * @since 10.0.0
070 */
071@HandlesTypes(RestServlet.class)
072public class JuneauRestServletContainerInitializer implements ServletContainerInitializer {
073
074   /** Context init parameter that opts a webapp into auto-registration. */
075   public static final String AUTO_REGISTER_PARAM = "juneau.rest.auto-register";
076
077   @Override /* ServletContainerInitializer */
078   public void onStartup(Set<Class<?>> classes, ServletContext ctx) throws ServletException {
079      if (! "true".equalsIgnoreCase(ctx.getInitParameter(AUTO_REGISTER_PARAM)))
080         return;
081      if (classes == null)
082         return;
083
084      for (var c : classes)
085         tryMount(c, ctx);
086   }
087
088   private static void tryMount(Class<?> c, ServletContext ctx) {
089      if (! isMountable(c))
090         return;
091      var servlet = instantiate(c);
092      if (servlet == null)
093         return;
094      var resolved = RestContext.resolveTopLevelPaths(c, servlet, null);
095      if (resolved.length == 0)
096         return;
097      var reg = ctx.addServlet(c.getName(), servlet);
098      if (reg == null)
099         return; // A servlet with this name is already registered (e.g. via web.xml).
100      for (var path : resolved)
101         reg.addMapping(toUrlMapping(path));
102   }
103
104   private static boolean isMountable(Class<?> c) {
105      if (c == null || c.isInterface() || Modifier.isAbstract(c.getModifiers()))
106         return false;
107      return c.isAnnotationPresent(Rest.class);
108   }
109
110   private static RestServlet instantiate(Class<?> c) {
111      try {
112         return (RestServlet) c.getDeclaredConstructor().newInstance();
113      } catch (ReflectiveOperationException | RuntimeException e) {
114         // Best-effort: a servlet that needs constructor-injected collaborators can't be
115         // auto-mounted by the plain Servlet-spec path and is simply skipped here.
116         return null;
117      }
118   }
119
120   private static String toUrlMapping(String rawPath) {
121      var p = rawPath == null ? "" : rawPath;
122      while (p.endsWith("/") && p.length() > 1)
123         p = p.substring(0, p.length() - 1);
124      if (p.isEmpty())
125         return "/";
126      if (! p.startsWith("/"))
127         p = "/" + p;
128      return p;
129   }
130}
